channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Idea: **Shazam for Movies** Upload a screenshot, short clip, or Reel/Shorts link from social media and instantly find the movie or TV show using AI. Thinking of building this with **Next.js + FastAPI + OpenCLIP + Whisper**. Thoughts?
How I Built an AI Contract Generator with Python and DeepSeek
item.description: How I Built an AI Contract Generator with Python and DeepSeek Hey everyone, I'm Alex. I recently built MikaAI, an AI contract generator, and wanted to share the journey. The idea came from my own...

item.title: Trabalhando com mapMulti() – Transforme seus streams sem neuras
item.description: Trabalhando com mapMulti() – Transforme seus streams sem neuras E aí, dev? Tudo certo? Se você está no JDK 16 ou superior, a Stream API ganhou um novo brinquedo: o método mapMulti(). Ele parece...

item.title: I’ve tested the latest Switch 2 controllers, and this one is the best

item.title: Top 5 AWS NAT Gateway Mistakes Teams Make & How to Fix Them
item.description: Introduction NAT Gateway is the AWS service most teams overpay for, and they usually don't notice until the bill is already in four figures. Every time I run an AWS NAT Gateway cost optimization...

item.description: Screenshot demonstrates the hologram resolution of 100 x 100, recording and restoring the object wireframe cube with 80 glowing dots on edges, with Fractal Time Generator. Krestianstvo Wavefront...

item.title: Running while sick: Learning Progress Pt.14
item.description: Daily learning part fourteen. Last night the pain worsened. My head and my eye felt like they wanted to explode. I woke up too many times throughout the night and vomited. I had really bad sleep...

item.title: Why I Abandoned Platform Stores and Built My Own Payment Gateway
item.description: The Problem We Were Actually Solving I was building a software as a service product that catered to a global audience, and I needed a reliable payment processing system. However, I soon realized...

item.title: AI Agents Don't Crash. They Drift. Here's the Framework to See It.
item.description: The scariest AI agent failures don't trigger alerts. They look like success. Here's a 7-dimension resilience framework for building trust in agentic systems — based on the AWS Architecture Blog's...

item.title: I built a server-side analytics tool. Here's what 19 WordPress sites actually receive.
item.description: 16 days ago I deployed to live for first time SysWP Radar — server-side analytics for WordPress. Today's numbers: +590K events captured across 19 sites +12K AI crawlers identified (GPTBot,...

item.title: How to build your first MCP server in 10 minutes
item.description: I built my first MCP server last week and it was way simpler than I expected. Here is exactly how, no fluff. Prerequisites Node.js 20+ 10 minutes Step 1: Scaffold npx create-mcp-server...

item.title: I Gave My OpenClaw Agent a Physical Body
item.description: The coding skills of AI models are about to make it much easier to build and deploy robots.

item.description: Hello and welcome to Regulator, a newsletter for Verge subscribers about the car crashes piling up on a daily basis at the Washington-based intersection of technology and politics. If you're not a...

item.title: Vibe coding is coming to your phone
item.description: "There's an app for that" was the promise of the App Store from the very beginning. The app that will get your phone to do the thing you want it to? It's just a few taps away. The tagline wasn't...

item.title: Volvo is trying to put its EV stumbles in the rearview
item.description: Volvo once had ambitions to fully exit the gas car business. Now it's trying to keep its tenuous foothold in the EV market. It's not an understatement to say that Volvo's EV journey has been a...

item.title: OpenAI barrels towards IPO that may happen in September
item.description: A day after Elon Musk lost his lawsuit that threatened OpenAI's structure, leadership and finances, OpenAI is reportedly back to prepping for its IPO.

item.title: Microsoft Open-Sources RAMPART and Clarity to Secure AI Agents During Development
item.description: Microsoft has unveiled two new open-source tools called RAMPART and Clarity to assist developers in better testing the security of artificial intelligence (AI) agents. RAMPART, short for Risk...

item.title: A new experiment brings better group meetings to Google Beam
item.description: A small group meeting featuring two in-room participants and three participants on-screen.

item.title: You can now remix other people’s YouTube Shorts with AI
item.description: Google announced a new YouTube Shorts Remix feature that lets users restyle clips or even insert themselves into other people's videos using Gemini Omni. Now, at the bottom of a YouTube Short,...

item.title: Samsung has a tentative deal with workers to avoid a memory chip strike
item.description: More than 47,000 Samsung Electronics workers were gearing up for an 18-day strike after bonus payment negotiations between the company and its union collapsed. The strike was set to start on...

item.title: Xbox hires game industry analyst Matthew Ball to lead strategy
item.description: Microsoft has recruited game industry analyst Matthew Ball as Xbox chief strategy officer. Ball publishes an annual state of video gaming report, which is a popular read across the game industry,...

item.title: Google Search’s AI evolution includes more ads
item.description: Google's AI-powered Search era apparently also extends to its ads. Now, when you look for a product in Search, Google's Gemini AI model will surface relevant items and generate a "custom...

item.title: Anker’s travel-friendly Laptop Power Bank has returned to its best price of the year
item.description: Whether you’re heading out for a quick Memorial Day getaway or preparing for summer travel, a reliable power bank can come in handy when there’s no outlet in sight. Fortunately, Anker’s Laptop...

item.title: AI search startups are blowing up
item.description: AI search has quietly become one of the most attractive targets in consumer AI.

item.title: Stability AI releases a new audio model that can create 6-minute songs
item.description: Stability Audio 3.0 small model can run on-device and generate two-minute long tracks.

item.title: The Verge’s 2026 high school graduation gift guide
item.description: High school graduation is a time of change that might be felt more deeply by family members than by the grads themselves. While some grads may immediately embark on a career path, many continue...

item.title: Microsoft Takes Down Malware-Signing Service Behind Ransomware Attacks
item.description: Microsoft on Tuesday said it disrupted a malware-signing-as-a-service (MSaaS) operation that weaponized the company's Artifact Signing system to deliver malicious code and conduct ransomware and...

item.title: On AI Security
item.description: Good report: Executive Summary: Let’s say you wanted to make sure that your AI is secure. Can you just maximize the security and privacy benchmark and call it a day? Nope, because benchmarks don’t...

item.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close in 1 week: Window to nominate and apply for the most promising startups closes May 27
item.description: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close May 27. Pitch at TechCrunch Disrupt, get investor access, win $100K, plus more scaling perks. Nominate an early-stage founder or submit your startup today.

item.title: NanoClaw creator turns down $20M buyout offer, raises $12M seed instead
item.description: NanoClaw was created as a secure alternative to OpenClaw to assist the Cohen brothers with their AI marketing firm that used agents to do much of the work. But instead of running directly on a...
